FEATURES.TITLE: Features & Integrations
FEATURES.GOOGLE_DESC: Easily manage and schedule appointments on your Google Calendar, syncing with your existing schedule to avoid double bookings and saving time. This feature allows you to view all your bookings in one place and manage them efficiently.
FEATURES.ONLINE_BOOKING_DESC: Allow clients to easily book appointments online, at any time and from any facility. This feature allows your clients to schedule appointments with you without needing to call or visit your business in person, providing them with flexibility and convenience.
FEATURES.RESERVATION_CONFIG_DESC: Customize your booking form to suit your style
FEATURES.HOW_IT_WORKS_DESC: Find out how to configure your settings
FEATURES.NOTIFICATION_DESC: Stay informed with automatic notifications sent via SMS and email, keeping you and your clients informed of upcoming appointments, confirmations and reminders. This feature ensures that everyone is on the same page and eliminates the possibility of missed appointments.
FEATURES.CUSTOMER_DESC: Keep track of all your clients, their contact information, and their booking history, allowing you to easily manage repeat customers and build long-term relationships. This feature provides you with a comprehensive overview of your client base and their interactions with your business.
FEATURES.API_DESC: Connect your reservation form with notado
FEATURES.INTEGRATE_DESC: Connect your booking system to other tools, such as Stripe, Slack etc., to expand your reach and streamline your workflow. This feature allows you to integrate your booking system with other tools you use, making it more convenient for you and your clients.
FEATURES.WAY_HOW_USE_IT_DESC: 3 ways how to allow booking on your website
FEATURES.PAYMENTS_DESC: Allow clients to easily pay for appointments online, with support for multiple payment methods. This feature enables you to accept payments from clients directly through the booking system, making the process more streamlined and convenient for both parties.
FEATURES.SECURITY_DESC: Rest easy knowing your client data is secure with our robust security measures. This Notado ensures that your clients' personal information is protected and that your business remains compliant with relevant security regulations.
FEATURES.FACEBOOK_DESC: Allow clients to book appointments directly through your Facebook and Instagram pages. This feature increases your reach and makes it easier for clients to book appointments with you.
FEATURES.EDIT_FORM_DESC: Allows you to modify your booking form and make changes to it as needed. This feature ensures that your booking form remains up-to-date and relevant to your business.
FEATURES.VOUCHERS_DESC: Offer your clients the option to purchase coupons and gift cards, which can be redeemed for appointments. This feature provides an additional revenue stream for your business and allows clients to purchase services as gifts for others.
FEATURES.ZOOM_DESC: Facilitate virtual appointments by integrating your booking system with Zoom. This feature allows you to schedule and conduct virtual appointments with clients, expanding the reach of your business and catering to clients who may not be able to visit your physical location.
FEATURES.ATTENDEES_DESC: Allow clients to specify the number of attendees for an appointment, making it easier to plan and schedule group appointments. This feature can be useful for businesses that offer group services such as classes, workshops or group therapy sessions. It allows to manage the capacity of the venue and schedule the resources needed, also it can be useful to set different prices for different number of attendees. This feature provides more flexibility for clients and a better overview for the business owner.
FEATURES.CUSTOMIZABLE_MSG_DESC: Customize your customer notifications with our Custom Notification Message Feature. Use keywords such as #service, #employee, #date, and more to personalize your messages and improve customer experience.
FEATURES.CALENDAR_AVAILABILITY_DESC: Our booking system now offers a convenient Calendar Availability Widget that allows clients to embed a calendar directly onto their website. This feature provides customers with an easy and quick way to view available dates and book appointments or reservations without leaving your website.
FEATURES.CUSTOM_SCHEDULE_DESC: Do you want to take tomorrow off and work two hours overtime the day after? With notad, this is not a problem.

FEATURES.SEASON_TICKET_DESC: Offer clients the opportunity to purchase and redeem season tickets with a configurable number of entries according to your needs.

CONTACT.TITLE: My Journey to Creating a Successful Online Booking System
CONTACT.LABEL1: Two years ago, when I was suffering from back pain, I was going through a labyrinth of confusing websites and complicated forms trying to book a massage. This frustrating experience became the seed of the idea to create my own online booking system. Instead of a simple process, I encountered confusion, redundant information and outdated procedures.
CONTACT.LABEL2: I started by looking for existing solutions and found that many of them were either too complicated or tried to integrate the booking system with the planning calendar - which I find redundant. After five hours of searching and researching, I came to the conclusion that a system that met my requirements simply do not exist.
CONTACT.LABEL3: So I decided to create it myself - and so my own online booking system was born. It has been a journey full of challenges, learning and growth. Although developing the system has had its challenging moments, I am grateful for the opportunity to learn something new and create a tool that helps others.

MANAGE_ON_GOOGLE.TITLE: Google Calendar as Booking System
MANAGE_ON_GOOGLE.DESC1:
A vast majority of reservation systems are just other planning calendars that you have to learn to use. 
 
 Using a calendar provided by a third-party service like Google Calendar have a number of advantages. For one, it provide cheaper reservation system as we dont need to develop and maintain our own calendar system. Additionally, a service like Google Calendar are more reliable and secure than a calendar system that other reservation system develop in-house. Additionally, using Google calendar provide your organization access to a range of useful features and integrations, such as the ability to easily share calendars with other users and the ability to access your calendar from multiple facilities. 
 
Let's face it: we've chosen the best calendar on the market and adapted it.
MANAGE_ON_GOOGLE.LABEL2: Manage bookings from your mobile phone
MANAGE_ON_GOOGLE.DESC2:
Thanks to the integration with Google calendar and Google contacts notado allows you to manage reservations and customer management through Google mobile applications. 

Managing your Google Calendar from your phone has several advantages. First, it allows you to access your schedule and make updates on the go, whether you're at a meeting, doing massage or haircut. This means you can always stay on top of your schedule and avoid double-booking or missing important events.
MANAGE_ON_GOOGLE.DESC3:
When registering, setup Notado once to suit your business and then just use Google Calendar. 
 
Notado sends reservations created by your clients to your Google Calendar and at the same time, thanks to synchronization, knows about all events created in Google Calendar by you.

ONLINE_RESERVATION.TITLE: Online Booking
ONLINE_RESERVATION.LABEL: Reservations available 24/7. You are engaged in business and leave the handling of reservations to us.
ONLINE_RESERVATION.LABEL1:
Having an online reservation system for your business is beneficial in several ways. First, it allows customers to easily book and manage their reservations, which can increase convenience and satisfaction. This can lead to more repeat business and positive reviews.

Another advantage of online reservations is the ability to manage and track bookings in real-time. This can help you better plan staffing and resources, and ensure that you're able to accommodate all of your customers.

Online reservations can also help you save time and reduce the risk of errors. Instead of manually taking reservations over the phone or in person, you can simply manage bookings through your online system. This can free up your time and reduce the likelihood of mistakes.

Overall, having an online reservation system can improve convenience for customers, increase efficiency for your business, and help you better plan and manage bookings.

WHY.LABEL1:
You say I've done reservations by phone so far and everything worked fine, so what's the point of online bookings? The truth is that if you have a business with a regular clientele, you basically don't need a booking system. 
 
 At the moment but when you want to expand the list of your clients, telephone reservations are simply not enough.
WHY.TITLE4: Why are phone reservations not enough?
WHY.LABEL2:
Without the possibility of online reservations, it will lose especially young clients. They strongly prefer online reservations over telephone ones. 
 
 Online reservations, unlike telephone reservations, are available at any time, which is one of their main advantages. The client does not have to wait until you'll be open or when you're on the phone, but you can also order at night.

CALENDAR_AVAILABILITY.TITLE: Put Calendar Availability to your Website
CALENDAR_AVAILABILITY.P1: Our booking system now offers a convenient Calendar Availability Widget that allows clients to embed a calendar directly onto their website. This feature provides customers with an easy and quick way to view available dates and book appointments or reservations without leaving your website.
CALENDAR_AVAILABILITY.P2: The Calendar Availability Widget is highly customizable, allowing clients to choose from a variety of colors, fonts, and layouts to match the style of their website. You can even add your own branding, such as a logo, to make the widget truly your own.
CALENDAR_AVAILABILITY.P3: To access the Calendar Availability Widget, simply log in to your account and navigate to the appropriate section. Once you have customized the widget to your liking, you can easily embed the code onto your website, and it will update automatically in real-time.
CALENDAR_AVAILABILITY.P4: By using the Calendar Availability Widget, clients can streamline their booking process and offer customers a seamless experience. This feature is an excellent way to increase customer engagement, boost your website's user experience, and ultimately, grow your business.
CALENDAR_AVAILABILITY.ALT: The image shows a customizable calendar widget embedded on a website, displaying available dates for booking appointments or reservations. The widget is styled to match the website's design, with the client's logo displayed prominently at the top. Customers can easily select a date and time, and book their appointment or reservation directly from the widget without leaving the website.

GOOGLE_CALENDAR.TITLE: How Notado works with my Google calendar
GOOGLE_CALENDAR.LABEL0: After you connect notado to your Google calendar, notado will create a calendar for each of your employees as well as a calendar for entering company-wide events.
GOOGLE_CALENDAR.LABEL1: Both notado and you will write events in these calendars. In your case, it will be entered by vacation, sick or telephone reservations. In the case of notado, it will be online reservations made by your customers.
GOOGLE_CALENDAR.LABEL2: Notado reads all reservations for a given employee and the calendar of company-wide events before each reservation is made. Based on this information, notado calculates the possible reservation times for a given service and employee.
GOOGLE_CALENDAR.LABEL3: If you want to use your own already existing calendars, set it in the employee detail and delete the calendar created by nota.

VACATION.TITLE: How to assign vacation, sick or other leave to an employee
VACATION.LABEL0: In your Google calendar, create a vacation/sickness event (the name of the event doesn't matter) for the relevant employee. Similar to the image below, a vacation is created for the employee Jan. Notado will automatically know about it.
VACATION.LABEL1: Clear the cache of the relevant calendar in Notad.

OVERTIME.TITLE: How to assign yourself or an employee overtime
OVERTIME.LABEL1: In your Google calendar, create an Overtime event (the name of the event doesn't matter) for the relevant employee. Set the event to Available. Notado will automatically know about it.
OVERTIME.LABEL2: Clear the cache of the relevant calendar in Notad.

SPECIFIC_CLOSE_DAYS.TITLE: How to enter specific days when my business is closed
SPECIFIC_CLOSE_DAYS.LABEL0:
Into the company-wide calendar, enter events that concern all of your employees (e.g. the renovation of the premises). Notado will not allow you to make any bookings on this date.
(Due to the protection of notado, the booking is cached for 12 hours, the entry of a business event is will manifest only after this time.)
SPECIFIC_CLOSE_DAYS.LABEL1: The company holiday calendar can be set in the details of the company.

EDIT_EVENT.TITLE: How to change or delete a reservation
EDIT_EVENT.LABEL0: You can easily move or delete a reservation in your Google Calendar. When editing reservations, Google Calendar allows you to add a note about the reasons for the change. This note is automatically sent to your customer along with the reservation details.

CANCEL_EVENT.TITLE: Cancellation of reservation by the client
CANCEL_EVENT.LABEL0: In the notification email, add the tag #reservation-cancel to the email, then a link will be automatically generated through which your client can cancel the reservation.
CANCEL_EVENT.LABEL1: In "Reservation Settings" it is possible to set a time limit for canceling a reservation.

PHONE_BOOKING.TITLE: How to combine telephone and electronic reservations
PHONE_BOOKING.LABEL0: If a customer calls you and arranges a reservation, create this reservation in your Google calendar for the relevant employee. Notado will automatically know about it and will take this reservation into account when creating other electronic reservations.
PHONE_BOOKING.LABEL1: If the customer wants to book into a group service for which there is already a reservation, just add the customer as another participant. Notado will automatically synchronize again. (The example in the picture shows adding Zbynk to a Yoga lesson)
PHONE_BOOKING.LABEL2: If you add events to Google calendar manually, don't forget to clear the cache:

VOUCHER.TITLE: Where can I find entered vouchers and customer comments
VOUCHER.LABEL0: Click on the event in your Google calendar. The voucher and the customer's note are circled in the image.

SHARE.TITLE: How to give an employee control over bookings
SHARE.LABEL0: In order to enable the employee to control the bookings, it is necessary for the employee to have a Google account. Then just share the corresponding calendar with your employee. The employee will see the calendar under his Google account and has the right to create and edit individual events.
SHARE.LABEL1: In this way, he is able to enter vacation, sick leave and change or delete existing reservations for himself or his colleagues.

COURSE.TITLE: How to book courses, lessons and events
COURSE.LABEL0: Courses and lessons in notado, unlike classic services, are booked by first creates an event/s for the given course in Google Calendar. Your clients will be added to this event via notada until the course capacity is exhausted. The name of the event needs to be entered in notada - see video:
COURSE.LABEL1: To see your event in Notado immediately, delete the cache:
COURSE.LABEL2: For booking courses, lessons and events, you may want to set the option to add the number of participants:

MULTIPLE_BUSINESS.TITLE: I have multiple businesses on different websites
MULTIPLE_BUSINESS.LABEL0: Write to us and we will make this function available to you. info@notado.cz

BUTTON_FOR_EACH_SERVICE.TITLE: I want a separate booking button for each service
BUTTON_FOR_EACH_SERVICE.LABEL0: Notado supports both the form for all services at once and for each service separately. You can find the codes for individual services - see the video:

CACHE.TITLE: I can't see the events that I entered in the calendar manually in notepad
CACHE.LABEL0: For the protection of Google services, notado caches the reservation for 12 hours. The cache is automatically deleted when the reservation is created, or you can delete it manually in notado.
CACHE.LABEL1: Manual deletion makes sense when creating courses, holidays, sick days, etc. (Otherwise, notado will see these events only after 12 hours or after the first reservation is created)

CUSTOMER.TITLE: I'm not saving new customers
CUSTOMER.LABEL0: Due to the protection of Google services, the customers are stored for 12 hours in the memory. If the customers do not appear even after this time, make sure that you have allowed notada access to Google contacts during the connection with the Google calendar.

16.TITLE: My leap into the digital world: How a booking system transformed my workshop.

My goal was to find a system that would not only improve the efficiency of our work, but also guarantee data security and protection our clients.
16.P9: Finding the ideal solution was challenging. I went through countless options, comparing features, prices and reviews. But finally I found a booking system that met all my requirements and was intuitive and easy to configure. Finally I could breathe again and focus on what what I like most - taking care of cars and satisfying my customers. And Tereza? She could finally stop searching in confusing tables and could focus on what she does best - excellent communication with customers.
